title: AgeGroup
description: Age-bucket classifier for Athletes + Teams. Answers 'is this Athlete eligible for this Team's age category?'. Carries `tenant_id` (CASCADE) + optionally `organization_id` (RESTRICT, nullable — null = tenant-wide). NEVER `application_id` (cascades through tenants), NEVER `region_id` (age groups apply uniformly across regions), NEVER `branch_id` (same U12 across every branch), NEVER `scope_node_id` (AgeGroup is a scope-node entity, not a scope consumer), NEVER `parent_id` (age groups are flat; numeric bounds establish ordering). Exactly one `is_default=true` per (tenant_id, organization_id, sport_key) tuple, seeded on TenantProvisioned. `is_seeded` is IMMUTABLE — set once by the platform seeder + never mutated by tenants. `organization_id` is IMMUTABLE post-create — moving an AgeGroup between organizations reshapes its scoping tuple.

x-eloquent.relations_note: `tenant()` belongsTo tenancy::Tenant via tenant_id (CASCADE). `organization()` belongsTo organization::Organization via organization_id (RESTRICT, nullable). Downstream: hasMany teams::Team via team.age_group_id (Wave 2b, RESTRICT), hasMany event::EventDivision via event_division.age_group_id (Wave 3+, RESTRICT); AthleteEnrollment references via age_group_snapshot_id (snapshotted; does NOT create a live FK).

x-database.description: One first-party table. Composite scoping via (tenant_id, organization_id nullable, sport_key nullable). Two partial-unique indexes guard the two hard invariants: (tenant_id, organization_id, sport_key, slug) live-only, and (tenant_id, organization_id, sport_key) live-and-default-true.

tenant_id.description: Every AgeGroup belongs to a Tenant. Cascade delete on TenantErased — hooked via `PreventAgeGroupOrphansOnTenantErased` for a graceful pre-delete audit pass.

organization_id.description: OPTIONAL. Null = tenant-wide age group; non-null = scoped to one Organization (a tenant running multiple brands may define per-brand rules). RESTRICT because deleting an Organization while it owns age groups is a data-quality error.

name.description: Display name (e.g. 'U12', 'Adult', 'Masters 50+', 'Girls U14'). Not unique — multiple sport_key variants may share a display name.

slug.description: URL-safe identifier. Unique per (tenant_id, organization_id, sport_key, slug) partial WHERE deleted_at IS NULL. Regex `^[a-z][a-z0-9-]*[a-z0-9]$`. Reserved: default, system, seeded, admin, platform.

sport_key.description: Optional sport identifier. Null = generic (applies across every sport for the tenant). Non-null = sport-specific override (e.g. 'football' U12 with a Jan 1 European federation cutoff). Enterprise-only via `age_group_sport_specific` entitlement. Pattern: `^[a-z][a-z0-9_]*$`.

description.description: Free-form description for the tenant admin UI + parent-facing enrollment previews.

min_age_inclusive.description: Inclusive lower bound. 3-100 (platform floor + ceiling). Bounds mutations fire AgeGroupBoundsChanged (audit-critical, 7-year retention).

max_age_inclusive.description: Inclusive upper bound. Must be >= min_age_inclusive. 3-100.

cutoff_date_kind.description: Enum: calendar_year / academic_year / rolling_from_birthday / custom_date. Determines how the CutoffDateCalculator resolves an athlete's effective age for eligibility on a given resolution date.

cutoff_month.description: 1-12. Required when cutoff_date_kind = academic_year OR custom_date. Ignored (must be NULL) for calendar_year + rolling_from_birthday.

cutoff_day.description: 1-31. Required when cutoff_date_kind = custom_date. Ignored (must be NULL) for other kinds.

gender_category.description: Enum: male / female / mixed / any. Nullable defaults to 'any'. For gender-segregated divisions (e.g. 'Girls U12', 'Boys U14', 'Mixed U8').

is_youth.description: Denormalised. Auto-derived by the observer from `max_age_inclusive < 18`. Stored for indexed filtering (safeguarding queries, minor-consent gating). Attempted caller mutation is silently overridden.

is_default.description: Exactly one is_default=true per (tenant_id, organization_id, sport_key) tuple. Auto-demote on flip. Enforced by partial unique index + observer + reconciler.

is_seeded.description: True when the row was created by SeedDefaultAgeGroupsForTenantJob. IMMUTABLE — set once + never mutated by tenant callers. Cannot be deleted (only edited).

sort_order.description: Ascending sort in AgeGroup-picker UI. Auto-derived from min_age_inclusive * 10 when unset.

color.description: Visualisation color as a CSS hex (#RGB or #RRGGBB, case-insensitive).

metadata.description: Free-form metadata bag (from HasMetadata trait). Never exposed on the wire without `?include=metadata` + metadata-read permission.

indexes.name: age_groups_scope_slug_unique
indexes.description: One live slug per (tenant, organization, sport_key) tuple. Soft-deleted rows do not collide. Nullable columns treated per Postgres' UNIQUE nulls-distinct semantics; the partial index handles the ambiguity explicitly.

indexes.name: age_groups_scope_default_unique
indexes.predicate: is_default = true AND deleted_at IS NULL
indexes.description: Enforces exactly-one-default per scoping tuple at the DB level. Belt-and-braces on top of the observer's auto-demote logic.

indexes.name: age_groups_bounds_lookup_idx
indexes.description: Resolver query: 'find the group with matching bounds for this DOB + sport_key'.

indexes.name: age_groups_youth_idx
indexes.description: Safeguarding query: 'list every youth group for this tenant'.

indexes.name: age_groups_seeded_idx
indexes.description: Catalog query: 'list every seeded (or custom) row for this tenant'. Feeds the entitlement drift dashboard.

display_label.description: Computed. `<name>` when sport_key is null, `<name> (<sport_key>)` otherwise.

bounds_summary.description: Computed. Human-readable bounds + cutoff (e.g. 'Ages 10-11 (calendar year cutoff)').

is_in_use.description: Computed. True when any non-snapshot inbound row (Team, EventDivision) references this AgeGroup.

inbound_reference_count.description: Computed via inbound-count aggregate. Included on show responses; suppressed on list responses unless `?include=inbound_reference_count` (list computation is N+1 without a rollup cache).

accepts: slug (case-insensitive, matches slug column within the resolved tenant + resolved scoping tuple when disambiguating parameters supplied via query string)

invariants: min_age_inclusive <= max_age_inclusive (enforced by rule + observer + BoundsConsistencyProbe).
is_youth = (max_age_inclusive < 18) — DERIVED by the observer; caller mutations silently overridden.
cutoff_date_kind='calendar_year' → cutoff_month IS NULL AND cutoff_day IS NULL.
cutoff_date_kind='rolling_from_birthday' → cutoff_month IS NULL AND cutoff_day IS NULL.
cutoff_date_kind='academic_year' → cutoff_month IS NOT NULL (1..12); cutoff_day IS NULL (defaults to 1 at resolution time).
cutoff_date_kind='custom_date' → cutoff_month IS NOT NULL (1..12) AND cutoff_day IS NOT NULL (1..31, month-appropriate).
sport_key IS NULL OR sport_key MATCHES /^[a-z][a-z0-9_]*$/.
sport_key IS NULL UNLESS the tenant carries `age_group_sport_specific` entitlement (enforced by observer — refuses at write time).
COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE is_default=true) = 1 per (tenant_id, organization_id, sport_key) tuple (enforced by unique index + observer + reconciler).
is_seeded IS IMMUTABLE post-create (AGE_GROUP_IS_SEEDED_IMMUTABLE — enforced by observer).
organization_id IS IMMUTABLE post-create (AGE_GROUP_ORG_IMMUTABLE — enforced by observer).
tenant_id IS IMMUTABLE post-create (TENANT_IMMUTABLE — enforced by observer + defense against cross-tenant FK smuggling).
is_default=true rows CANNOT be deleted or archived (CANNOT_DELETE_DEFAULT_AGE_GROUP — 409).
is_seeded=true rows CANNOT be deleted or archived (CANNOT_DELETE_SEEDED_AGE_GROUP — 409). Seeded rows may still be edited within entitlements.

AgeGroups in use CANNOT be archived or deleted (AGE_GROUP_IN_USE 409 — enforced by observer; Team.age_group_id + EventDivision.age_group_id references count; AthleteEnrollment.age_group_snapshot_id does NOT count).
Non-seeded (is_seeded=false) rows count against the tenant's `age_group_slot` entitlement; seeded rows do NOT (they are a platform invariant, not a purchase).
gender_category defaults to 'any' when null-on-write; explicit null saves as 'any'.
